UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NCO PORTFOLIO MANAGEMENT INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MEJRI, TAREK $1,585.11 PRINCIPAL, $182.84 INTEREST, $245.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,012.95, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ( MAILED)
